Anti-AgingVial (lyophilized)500mg

NAD+ 500mg

£45.00

NAD+ 500mg — large vial for extended research protocols on cellular aging, energy metabolism, and DNA repair. Essential co-substrate for sirtuins and PARPs, central to mitochondrial oxidative phosphorylation (ATP production). 2026 research links NAD+ to potential in Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease models. 500mg format dedicated to multi-week protocols requiring larger quantities.

Purity >98%
24h Dispatch
Stripe Secure
10 in stock
1

⚠ RESEARCH USE ONLY

For research and laboratory use only. This product is not a registered drug or dietary supplement.

Research Protocol Reference

Educational data — not medical advice

Reconstitution

5 mL bacteriostatic water

Concentration

100 mg/mL (500mg vial)

Typical Dose

50–100 mg per injection

Timing

AM

Frequency

2–3x per week

Cycle Length

Ongoing

Storage

-20°C lyophilized; 2-8°C reconstituted, use within 30 days.

Notes / Stacks

Higher concentration vial for extended use. SubQ or IM.

Reference data based on published research guides. For educational and laboratory purposes only.
